gmd:metadataStandardName.gco:CharacterString: ISO 19115-2 Geographic Information - Metadata - Part 2: Extensions for Imagery and Gridded Data

gmd:title.gco:CharacterString: Atlantic UxS Hydrographic Demonstration — REMUS 600, April 2026
NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

gmd:organisationName.gco:CharacterString: NOAA Atlantic Oceanographic and Meteorological Laboratory

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Background information for the Atlantic Oceanographic and Meteorological Laboratory, Miami, Florida.

gmd:organisationName.gco:CharacterString: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information
NOAA Atlantic Oceanographic and Meteorological Laboratory

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Background information for the Atlantic Oceanographic and Meteorological Laboratory, Miami, Florida.

gmd:abstract.gco:CharacterString: Hydrographic observations collected with a REMUS 600 autonomous underwater vehicle in the Gulf of Mexico during April 2026. The dataset supports demonstration of uncrewed-systems data flow from field collection through NCEI archival metadata. Measurements include conductivity, temperature, depth, and vessel-mounted ADCP currents along overlapping survey lines.

gmd:purpose.gco:CharacterString: Demonstrate end-to-end UxS acquisition metadata for NOAA/Navy alignment with ISO 19115-2 GMI and NCEI archival requirements.

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Background information for the Atlantic Oceanographic and Meteorological Laboratory, Miami, Florida.

gmd:keyword.gco:CharacterString: Oceans > Ocean Temperature > Water Temperature > Sea Water Temperature

gmd:thesaurusName.xlink:title: Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Science Keywords

gmd:keyword.gco:CharacterString: CONTINENT > NORTH AMERICA > UNITED STATES OF AMERICA > GULF OF MEXICO

gmd:thesaurusName.xlink:title: Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Location Keywords
Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Platform Keywords

gmd:keyword.gco:CharacterString: Profilers/Sounders > CTD > SBE 9plus Conductivity Temperature and Depth

gmd:thesaurusName.xlink:title: Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Instrument Keywords

gmd:keyword.gco:CharacterString: NOAA Ocean Uncrewed Systems Integration Project

gmd:thesaurusName.xlink:title: Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Project Keywords

gmd:keyword.gco:CharacterString: DOC/NOAA/NESDIS/NCEI > National Centers for Environmental Information, NESDIS, NOAA, U.S. Department of Commerce

gmd:thesaurusName.xlink:title: Global Change Master Directory (GCMD) Data Center Keywords

gmd:otherConstraints.gco:CharacterString: Cite as: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information. 2026. Atlantic UxS Hydrographic Demonstration — REMUS 600, April 2026. NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information. doi:10.7289/V5UXS-DEMO-2026
Related program: NOAA Uncrewed Systems Data Assembly guidance, version 2026-2.

gmd:title.gco:CharacterString: Flower Garden Banks NMS multibeam bathymetry composite

gmd:organisationName.gco:CharacterString: NOAA Office of National Marine Sanctuaries

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Related sanctuary program context for survey operating area.

gmd:title.gco:CharacterString: Uncrewed surface and underwater vehicles for operational hydrography (NOAA technical memorandum; placeholder)

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Northeastern Gulf of Mexico coastal and shelf waters adjacent to the West Florida Shelf, bounded for demonstration metadata.

gmd:supplementalInformation.gco:CharacterString: Trajectory sampling approximately 1 Hz; CTD pumped at ship-relative 0.5 m/s. QA/QC flags applied per AOML UxS field handbook (internal).

gmd:fees.gco:CharacterString: In most cases, electronic downloads of the data are free. However, fees may apply for custom orders, data certifications, copies of analog materials, and data distribution on physical media.

gmd:orderingInstructions.gco:CharacterString: Contact NCEI for other distribution options and instructions.

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Example HTTPS endpoint for gridded and profile products derived from the demonstration cruise.

gmi:description.gco:CharacterString: Teledyne RDI 600 kHz Workhorse Mariner ADCP for water-column currents.
Sea-Bird SBE 9plus underwater CTD with pumped flow.
Hydroid REMUS 600 autonomous underwater vehicle configured for coastal hydrography.
Sea-Bird SBE 9plus CTD mounted on REMUS-G01.
